description: ProPublica COMPAS Full Broward Dataset (7k records)
proposed_title: ProPublica COMPAS Recidivism — Race vs. Age-Category Stratification (2016)
encoding_note: two_year_recid=1 → Success (recidivated); group by race (treatment) × age_cat (stratum); count rows as Cases, sum two_year_recid as Successes per cell. Sex available as secondary stratum.
